/CAL:STATUS OF RELEASE/ACM/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED TO ACM FOR FITTING OF SCRAM, TRANSPORT TO HEALTHRIGHT 360 FOR DETOX-PROGRAM, AND FOR SUPERVISION WHEN DEFENDANT  IS NOT IN DETOX OR A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/X:ACM SUPERVISION TO INCLUDE 5 TIMES A WEEK CHECK-INS, OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL TREATMENT THROUGH MISSION COUNCIL, AND AA MEETINGS AT LEAST THREE TIMESPER WEEK WITH PROOF TO ACM,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/DOPU:RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM,/

/CAL: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT AND BAIL MOTION/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED TO ACM FOR TRANSPORT ONLY WITH        COORDINATED PICK-UP BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT /DEF: SHALL BE FITTED WITH SCRAM DEVICE BEFORE RELEASE ANDIS ORDERED     TO COMPLY WITH   ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD      AND  BY THE SFSD/X: POSSIBLE WALDEN HOUSE - HEALTH RIGHT 360 PROGRAM PENDING DETOX        BED AVAILABILITY/X: ALL FUTURE DATES ARE CONFIRMED/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/DOPU: IN RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM/
